mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, nickname, email, name, is_active, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{name}, #{isActive}, #{role}, now(), now()) RETURNING user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{reqDTO.username}, nickname = #{reqDTO.nickname}, email = #{reqDTO.email}, name = #{reqDTO.name}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active != 'INACTIVE'
UPDATE users SET is_active = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active != 'INACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT password FROM users where username = #{username} AND is_active != 'INACTIVE'
SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_active != 'INACTIVE'
SELECT role FROM users WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND is_active != 'INACTIVE'
SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND is_active != 'INACTIVE'
